source_family_overlaps_epoch_18: 2 Maori candidates (R426 haka + R431 taonga puoro — distinct mechanism class) and 2 Mapuche candidates (R437 kultrun + R448 ülkantun — distinct mechanism class) within epoch. Otherwise 21 distinct source cultures including Igbo Uli, Maasai boma, Hmong paj ntaub, Yakut scapulimancy, Anangu songline, Inuit katajjaq, Mosuo, Akha, Hutsul pysanka, Afar Danakil, Hadzabe click, Sardinian tenores, Bambara Bogolan, Akan Adinkra, Kogi Mama, Toraja, Yoruba Ifa, Tahitian heiva, Mbuti/Twa Pygmy, Garifuna, Boer Voortrekker. Improvement over epoch 17 (25 distinct cultures, perfect) but tighter than epoch 16 (Mongolian 3x + Hopi 2x).
